Authors: Inseon Kim, Hong-Yeop Song

Title: Transmitting Extra Bits With Cyclically Shifted LDPC Codes
Authors: Yinchu Wang, Ming Jiang, Xiao Ma
Abstract: In this letter, we propose a simple yet efficient coding scheme to transmit extra bits by cyclically shifting a low-density parity-check (LDPC) coded sequence without any additional consumption in bandwidth or transmission energy. Authors: Qianfan Wang, Suihua Cai, Li Chen, Xiao Ma

Abstract: This paper is concerned with a special class of unit memory convolutional codes (UMCCs), called block oriented UMCCs (BOUMCCs).
